title: cosmos sulphureus var. typicus
intro: Cosmos sulphureus var. typicus, also known as the Mexican or Sulfur Cosmos, is a variety of flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the lymphatic system and support the immune system, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Cosmos sulphureus var. typicus include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support the body's natural detoxification processes. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
